title: Piramal Pharma is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Piramal Pharma is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Piramal Pharma in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Piramal Pharma:
Piramal Pharma is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Piramal Pharma!
